The Vietnam Edge — Apple's #2 Factory + Nike's #1 Footwear Hub
🏭 Vietnam: The Indispensable ASEAN Supply Chain Node

Vietnam has achieved what no other ASEAN country has: simultaneously becoming the critical manufacturing hub for two of America's most supply-chain-sensitive consumer brands — Apple and Nike.


This creates a unique dual supply chain concentration risk that is unmatched in the region:

  • Apple: Vietnam = #2 manufacturing hub after China. AirPods: ~90% of global supply. iPad: major assembly hub (Foxconn Binh Duong). MacBook: Foxconn + Compal Vietnam operations expanding. Any halt = direct AAPL quarterly earnings miss.
  • Nike: ~50% of all Nike footwear manufactured in Vietnam. Most concentrated single-country garment exposure of any US brand. NKE tariff risk is existential.
  • Samsung: >20% of Vietnam's total exports. Single largest employer. Intel, LG also anchor tenants.

The Apple supply chain signal is designated a SINGLE TRIGGER (KC_02): if score ≥ 0.65, VRKI is immediately forced to ELEVATED regardless of all other kill conditions. This is the highest-urgency signal in the Vietnam domain — a Vietnam Apple production halt equals an Apple earnings downside surprise.

AirPods: 90% from Vietnam
Approximately 90% of all Apple AirPods are manufactured in Vietnam (Foxconn Bac Giang, Luxshare Nghe An). This is the world's highest single-product, single-country concentration risk in consumer electronics. A strike, flood, or power outage in Bac Giang = global AirPods shortage.
Currency Manipulator Watch
Vietnam's $116B trade surplus with the US is the 3rd largest globally. SBV's managed float satisfies at least one of Treasury's three manipulator criteria at all times. A formal designation would trigger automatic import restrictions and compound KC_03 tariff risk.
FDI Dependency = Systemic Risk
Vietnam's entire growth model depends on manufacturing FDI. Samsung alone accounts for >20% of total exports. Intel, LG, and Apple supply chain partners make Vietnam uniquely vulnerable to any single-investor relocation decision. India is the primary FDI diversion threat.

Apple + Nike Dual Supply Chain Concentration: Vietnam is the only country in the world where the #1 and #2 most-analysed US consumer brands (AAPL and NKE) have simultaneously critical manufacturing dependencies. A single adverse event (power shortage, labor strike, US tariff action, flood) in Vietnam's industrial zones hits BOTH stocks simultaneously — creating a correlated downside shock with no natural hedge.
Apple Supply Chain Monitor — KC_02 SINGLE TRIGGER
Single Trigger Alert Framework: KC_02 is the only single-trigger kill condition in SBV_VIETNAM_CANARY. If any credible news source reports a Vietnam Apple production halt (Foxconn Bac Giang, Luxshare Nghe An, or Compal), the score immediately reaches the 0.65 threshold and VRKI is forced to ELEVATED zone regardless of all other kill conditions. This reflects the direct quarterly earnings transmission to AAPL.

EVN Grid Stress MODERATE 2023 shortage echo risk. Industrial load growth outpacing grid capacity expansion in North. 🟡 WATCH

Rotating Blackout Risk NO CURRENT EVENT No factory shutdowns reported Q3 2026. 2023 repeat scenario: probability low but non-zero. 🟢 NONE ACTIVE

2023 precedent: Vietnam electricity shortages in May-June 2023 forced Samsung, major garment exporters, and electronics factories to operate at reduced capacity for 4-6 weeks. If repeated, KC_05 would trigger with direct impact on AAPL supply chain (Foxconn, Luxshare also affected).
